---
title: "Speaker Dashboard"
format: html

---

## \## Questions Queue


---

```yaml


## đźŽ¤ Moderate Questions

```{r}
#| context: server
#| echo: false

library(shiny)
library(DT)

# UI
ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Speaker Dashboard"),
  
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      h4("Controls"),
      actionButton("refresh", "đź”„ Refresh", class = "btn-primary"),
      br(), br(),
      actionButton("select_btn", "âś… Select Question", class = "btn-success"),
      actionButton("reject_btn", "âťŚ Reject Question", class = "btn-danger"),
      br(), br(),
      hr(),
      h4("Statistics"),
      textOutput("stats"),
      br(),
      h4("Selected Question"),
      verbatimTextOutput("selected_display")
    ),
    
    mainPanel(
      h4("Pending Questions"),
      DTOutput("questions_table"),
      br(),
      h4("Approved Questions"),
      DTOutput("approved_table")
    )
  )
)

# Server
server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  # Reactive values
  pending_questions <- reactiveVal(
    data.frame(
      ID = 1:5,
      Question = c(
        "How does AI embedding work?",
        "What is the accuracy of the model?",
        "Can we export data to CSV?",
        "How to handle multiple languages?",
        "Is the system real-time?"
      ),
      Country = c("USA", "China", "UK", "France", "Germany"),
      Topic = c("AI", "AI", "Analytics", "Multilingual", "Performance"),
      Submitted = c("10:30 AM", "10:32 AM", "10:35 AM", "10:38 AM", "10:40 AM"),
      Status = rep("Pending", 5),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  )
  
  approved_questions <- reactiveVal(
    data.frame(
      ID = integer(),
      Question = character(),
      Country = character(),
      Topic = character(),
      Selected_Time = character(),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  )
  
  selected_row <- reactiveVal(NULL)
  
  # Render pending table
  output$questions_table <- renderDT({
    datatable(pending_questions(),
              selection = 'single',
              options = list(pageLength = 10))
  })
  
  # Render approved table
  output$approved_table <- renderDT({
    datatable(approved_questions(),
              options = list(pageLength = 10))
  })
  
  # Capture selected row
  observeEvent(input$questions_table_rows_selected, {
    selected_row(input$questions_table_rows_selected)
    
    if(!is.null(selected_row())) {
      q <- pending_questions()[selected_row(), ]
      output$selected_display <- renderPrint({
        cat("Question ID:", q$ID, "\n")
        cat("Question:", q$Question, "\n")
        cat("Country:", q$Country, "\n")
        cat("Topic:", q$Topic)
      })
    }
  })
  
  # Select question
  observeEvent(input$select_btn, {
    req(selected_row())
    
    selected <- pending_questions()[selected_row(), ]
    
    # Add to approved
    new_approved <- data.frame(
      ID = selected$ID,
      Question = selected$Question,
      Country = selected$Country,
      Topic = selected$Topic,
      Selected_Time = format(Sys.time(), "%I:%M %p"),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    current_approved <- approved_questions()
    approved_questions(rbind(current_approved, new_approved))
    
    # Remove from pending
    current_pending <- pending_questions()
    pending_questions(current_pending[-selected_row(), ])
    
    # Reset selection
    selected_row(NULL)
    output$selected_display <- renderPrint({cat("No question selected")})
    
    showNotification("Question selected for live display!", type = "success")
  })
  
  # Reject question
  observeEvent(input$reject_btn, {
    req(selected_row())
    
    current_pending <- pending_questions()
    pending_questions(current_pending[-selected_row(), ])
    selected_row(NULL)
    output$selected_display <- renderPrint({cat("No question selected")})
    
    showNotification("Question rejected", type = "warning")
  })
  
  # Refresh
  observeEvent(input$refresh, {
    showNotification("Refreshing...", type = "message")
  })
  
  # Stats
  output$stats <- renderPrint({
    cat("Pending:", nrow(pending_questions()), "\n")
    cat("Approved:", nrow(approved_questions()))
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
